beginnerProjects.name: ArcRift
beginnerProjects.description: Persistent local memory layer for AI. ArcRift uses a Chrome extension and a native MCP server to sync context and decisions from your browser chats (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek) straight to your local IDE agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf)  powered by a local SQLite knowledge graph.
beginnerProjects.descriptionZh: 这是一个与 Agent、RAG、MCP、Coding 相关的 GitHub 开源项目，主要使用 TypeScript。它近期有明显增长，适合作为趋势观察、源码学习或二次开发候选。原文简介：Persistent local memory layer for AI. ArcRift uses a Chrome extension and a native MCP server to sync context and decisions from your browser chats (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek) straight to your local IDE agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf) powered by a local SQLite knowledge graph.

beginnerProjects.name: MaiBot
beginnerProjects.description: MaiSaka, an LLM-based intelligent agent, is a digital lifeform devoted to understanding you and interacting in the style of a real human. She does not pursue perfection, nor does she seek efficiency; instead, she values warmth, authenticity, and genuine connection.

beginnerProjects.name: Chatterbox-TTS-Server
beginnerProjects.description: Self-host the powerful Chatterbox TTS model. This server offers a user-friendly Web UI, flexible API endpoints (incl. OpenAI compatible), predefined voices, voice cloning, and large audiobook-scale text processing. Runs accelerated on NVIDIA (CUDA), AMD (ROCm), and CPU.
beginnerProjects.descriptionZh: 这是一个与 Model 相关的 GitHub 开源项目，主要使用 Python。它近期有明显增长，适合作为趋势观察、源码学习或二次开发候选。原文简介：Self-host the powerful Chatterbox TTS model. This server offers a user-friendly Web UI, flexible API endpoints (incl. OpenAI compatible), predefined voices, voice cloning, and large audiobook-scale text processing. Runs accelerated on NVIDIA (CUDA), AMD (ROCm), and CPU.
